prior_azure_cli_account.rule: Do not use for production AI_OS cloud resources unless separately approved.

unresolved_inputs.safe_collection: manual confirmation or sanitized screenshot only
manual confirmation of independent admin or recovery path
manual confirmation in dedicated AI TRADEZ browser profile

unresolved_inputs.rule: Must be separate from the primary Microsoft reset loop.

unresolved_inputs.safe_collection: manual confirmation of owner, account class, MFA, and recovery independence

cloudflare_access.step: Open Cloudflare dashboard in intended admin account
Confirm account name, admin class, and recovery path
cloudflare_access.evidence: sanitized screenshot or manual statement only

cloudflare_access.step: Confirm at least two independent Cloudflare admin paths
Locate Zero Trust / Access application setup area
Draft Access app name and protected hostname
Draft admin and end-user policies separately

microsoft_entra.step: Confirm Azure Portal uses AI TRADEZ dedicated browser profile
Confirm recovery email class is independent from primary Microsoft reset loop
Draft Microsoft/Entra provider settings for Cloudflare Access

github.step: Confirm ai-rtony91 account health and recovery path
Confirm GitHub login is independent from Microsoft recovery
Draft GitHub backup provider settings for Cloudflare Access
Confirm GitHub does not bypass AI_OS protected-action gates

google_optional.step: Decide whether Google adds independent recovery value
Confirm Google account class and owner if used
Reject Google if it creates account sprawl or weak recovery

otp_emergency.step: Confirm OTP mailbox is not trapped in Microsoft reset loop
Constrain OTP to emergency use only

required: Cloudflare admin recovery is not single-path
break-glass account is independent from Microsoft reset loop
recovery email class is separate from primary Microsoft account
GitHub backup is available or deferred with documented risk
rollback path exists for exact provider action
DNS, tunnel, and dashboard exposure are excluded until Access policy is proven

proof_requirements: Cloudflare Access test user can log in
Microsoft primary admin can log in
break-glass path is tested without daily admin
optional Google fallback decision is recorded
OTP emergency fallback is constrained or explicitly deferred
Turnstile token validation is proven in backend only
dashboard is inaccessible without Cloudflare Access
git status clean after each step
T9 savepoint after each major merge
AI_OS approval gates still control protected actions

before_each_provider_action: capture sanitized current provider UI state
confirm primary and backup admin paths
stop if any recovery path is unclear
after_each_provider_action: confirm dashboard remains unexposed unless explicitly approved later
stop and revert only the last provider change if login proof fails
